## Why It Needs Coverage

## Test Category

Which categories apply? (check all that apply)

- [ ] `@smoke` — verify the page loads
- [ ] `@navigation` — verify links and routing
- [ ] `@forms` — verify form validation
- [ ] `@functional` — verify business logic
- [ ] `@visual` — screenshot regression
- [ ] `@responsive` — layout at mobile/tablet/desktop

- [ ] No account creation / login required
